evals.expected_output: Skill reads dopple.toml, runs dopple deploy, reports manifest URL and QR page URL back to the user
expectations: Checks for dopple.toml in the project root
Runs dopple whoami or checks auth status
Reports the manifest URL to the user
Reports the QR page URL to the user

evals.prompt: deploy this as physics-test and share in #builds
evals.expected_output: Skill runs dopple deploy --as physics-test, then posts to #builds Slack channel with QR code and manifest URL
expectations: Uses --as flag with the variant name physics-test
Attempts to post to #builds Slack channel
Tries Slack MCP first, falls back to webhook if unavailable
Includes QR page URL in Slack message
Includes activity name and variant in Slack message

evals.prompt: I just pushed a fix to the particle system, can you ship it to the team?
evals.expected_output: Skill recognizes this as a deploy request, runs dopple deploy, and posts to Slack if configured
expectations: Recognizes 'ship it to the team' as a deploy + notify request
Attempts Slack notification since user said 'to the team'
